briefs.title: Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation amended — new entries added to Schedule 1
briefs.summary: Effective February 4, 2026, BC updated the Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation by adding new entries to Schedule 1. This schedule lists the types of local government bylaw violations that can be handled through a ticketing system (written notices with set fines) instead of going to court.
briefs.action_required: Check with your local municipality to see if any new bylaw violations now apply to your business.

key_dates.label: BC Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation Schedule 1 amendments take effect
